en_title: The Special PS5-Only Physical Revered Edition of Mortal Shell 2 Has Sold Out, and Fans Are Sending the News Sony's Way as They Continue to Push for a U-Turn on Killing Discs
cn_title: 索尼取消光盘争议中，《致命躯壳2》PS5实体限定版售罄
subtitle: 实体需求仍旺
opus_summary: 《致命躯壳2》PS5实体崇敬版预购八天基本售罄，玩家借此继续要求索尼撤回2028年停止新游戏光盘生产的决定，但分析师认为索尼不会让步。

paragraphs.en: The special PS5-only physical Revered Edition of Mortal Shell 2 has sold out, its publisher has announced — and gamers are sending the news Sony’s way as they continue to push the company to reverse its decision to do away with discs.
paragraphs.cn: PS5独占实体版《致命躯壳2》崇敬版已售罄。发行商公布消息后，玩家纷纷把它转给索尼，继续要求公司撤回取消光盘的决定。

paragraphs.en: Sony will stop production of discs for new PlayStation games released from 2028 onwards, angering some fans who have expressed concern about preservation and long-term ownership. Gamers continue to flood PlayStation social media posts with angry responses, and are even starting to overshadow the release of new games that have nothing to do with Sony’s policy.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼将从2028年起停止为新PlayStation游戏生产光盘，引发部分担忧保存和长期所有权的粉丝愤怒。玩家持续用愤怒回复淹没PlayStation社交帖，甚至开始盖过与政策无关的新游戏发售。

paragraphs.en: The Mortal Shell 2 Revered Edition includes the game on disc, a 100+ page softcover artbook, a steelbook, and three fine art prints all inside a collector´s tuck-in box. Publisher Playstack has said demand for it has “exceeded expectations,” and has essentially sold out just eight days after pre-orders went live.
paragraphs.cn: 《致命躯壳2》崇敬版包含实体光盘、100多页平装画集、铁盒和三幅艺术印刷品，全部装在收藏盒中。发行商Playstack称需求「超出预期」，预购开启仅八天便基本售罄。

paragraphs.en: “Due to the Mortal Shell 2’s release date of August 20, and the manufacturing time required to replenish stock, there is a very low chance of additional physical copies becoming available before the game’s release,” the publisher continued. “We are working with our distribution partner to review ongoing demand and we’ll update as soon as we hear their decision on next steps. To be clear, there is no guarantee of a stock replenishment plan after launch as this decision is not ours to make.”
paragraphs.cn: 发行商表示：「由于《致命躯壳2》8月20日发售，补货所需制造时间很长，发售前追加实体版的可能性极低。我们正与经销伙伴评估持续需求，收到后续决定便会更新。需要说明，发售后也无法保证补货，因为决定权不在我们。」

paragraphs.en: Of course, there’s no word on exactly how many units of the Revered Edition were manufactured for launch, and it’s important to note that the standard physical edition of Mortal Shell 2 on PS5 remains available to buy. But that hasn’t stopped gamers from using the situation with Mortal Shell 2 as evidence that Sony has got this very wrong.
paragraphs.cn: 目前并不知道首发生产了多少套崇敬版，而且PS5标准实体版仍可购买。但这并未阻止玩家以《致命躯壳2》的情况证明索尼大错特错。

paragraphs.en: @PlayStation oh look people want physical games so much they sell out you pieces of shit. pic.twitter.com/xUbmqFrQEn
paragraphs.cn: @PlayStation，瞧，大家太想要实体游戏，以至于直接卖光了，你们这些混蛋。

paragraphs.en: I thought Sony said Physical Media was dead. That is too bad, No disk No buy pic.twitter.com/bp9D7KKj50
paragraphs.cn: 我还以为索尼说实体媒介已经死了。太遗憾了，没光盘就不买。

paragraphs.en: Man, and we were being gaslight into believing nobody buys physical. How strange
paragraphs.cn: 我们还被灌输「没人买实体版」的说法，真奇怪。

paragraphs.en: We’ve already reported on how new games are getting caught up in the ongoing Sony backlash . The digital-only Denshattack!, for example, launched yesterday and angry gamers swarmed on PlayStation’s social media posts promoting the release, even warning people against buying it on Sony’s console.
paragraphs.cn: 我们已报道新游戏如何卷入索尼抵制。纯数字游戏《Denshattack!》昨日发售，愤怒玩家涌入PlayStation宣传帖，甚至警告人们不要购买索尼主机版。

paragraphs.en: Will Sony reverse its decision? Every analyst we’ve spoken to about this has said there’s no chance . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony — which is not going to change its mind.
paragraphs.cn: 问题最终仍是：索尼会撤回决定吗？接受采访的所有分析师都认为绝无可能。Kantan Games CEO Serkan Toto博士称，即便50万人取消PlayStation Plus，也只是索尼业务中的沧海一粟，不足以令其改弦更张。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒介爱好者，但索尼不会撤销这项决定。他们当然早已知道网络反应会是什么样子，现在只是在等这场风波过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿名PlayStation活跃用户，约有5,000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。假设有50万人为抗议而退订，那也只相当于这项业务流失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新考虑。数字业务实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 随着主机成本上涨、销量预计大幅下滑，新游戏全面数字化能让索尼从每笔销售中赚到更多。以《最后生还者》这样的PlayStation第一方游戏为例，实体版收入中索尼只能留下约65%，约30%归零售商，另有约5%用于生产。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》等第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的授权费可能只有约为15%。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 数字下载的利润率则高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自有的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入；对于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%，也就是一款70美元(约合人民币475元)的游戏能为其带来约21美元(约合人民币143元)的收入。

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said the data backs this up, and that a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere分析师Piers Harding-Rolls称数据印证了这一点，过去两代主机间发生了巨大变化。他表示：「主机游戏是游戏业实体媒介最后的堡垒，但实体产品的重要性持续下降。2013年PS4推出时，索尼主机完整游戏销量中仅13%为数字版；到2025年，数字购买占比已接近80%。」

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 他表示：「PlayStation玩家必然担忧选择权、在新主机读取旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏以及游戏保存等问题，但玩家的购买趋势非常明确。」

paragraphs.en: One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，实体媒体粉丝曾经有机会却错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu告诉《金融时报》：「如果玩家和保存主义者当初购买更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以证明这一决定合理的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: “Digital game sales carry essentially 100% incremental margin... the cost of the physical package, shipping and retailer margins can be more than 20% per cent of sticker price.”
paragraphs.cn: 「数字游戏销售基本拥有100%的增量利润……实体包装、运输和零售商利润的成本，可能超过标价的20%。」
